preflight._comment_gid: GID index to check on all RDMA interfaces (typically 3 for RoCE)
preflight._comment_rocm: Expected ROCm version across all cluster nodes
preflight._comment_connectivity: RDMA connectivity testing: basic (adjacent pairs), full_mesh (all pairs), sample (20% random), or skip
preflight._comment_interfaces: List of specific RDMA interface names to check and test
preflight._comment_connectivity_tool: RDMA connectivity testing uses ibv_rc_pingpong (direct IB verbs) for RCCL-compatible testing
